auth.privacyAgree: Ke bale 'me ke lumela le litlhoko tse ka holimo
auth.otpSent: Khout e rometse ho {{phone}}. Nakong ea tlhahiso, sebelisa 000000.
auth.invalidPhone: Ka kopo kenya nomoro ea mohala e nepahetseng ea Afrika Boroa (+27 kapa 0 e lateloa ke manomoro a robong).
auth.invalidOtp: Ka kopo kenya khout ea manomoro a tsheletseng.
auth.errorNetwork: Phoso ea marang-rang. Ka kopo hlahloba khokahano ea hau 'me leka hape.
auth.errorUnknown: Ho etsahetse ntho e sa nepahalang. Ka kopo leka hape.

kyc.title: Netefatso ea Botho
kyc.body: Netefatso ea botho e tla ba teng haufinyane. O ntse o ka hlahloba QuroVita nakong ena.

home.title: Lirekoto Tsa Ka Tsa Bophelo
home.noRecords: Ha ho lirekoto tsa bophelo joale. Lirekoto tse aroletsoeng le uena ke kliniki li tla hlaha mona.

share.title: Arolelana Lirekoto
share.body: Kgetha lirekoto tseo u batlang ho li arolelana, ebe u tobetsa Arolelana ho hlahisa khout ea QR e sirelelitsoeng bakeng sa kliniki.

assistant.title: Motlatsi oa Bophelo
assistant.disclaimer: Motlatsi ena o fana ka tlhaiso-leseling ea kakaretso ea bophelo feela. Ha a kake a hlalosa liphello tsa hau tsa liteko kapa a u fa keletso ea bongaka. Lula u buisana le mofani oa tlhokomelo ea bophelo oa hau.
assistant.blockedMessage: Ha ke kake ka araba potso eo e itseng mabapi le liphello tsa hau, empa nka hlalosa maikutlo a kakaretso a bophelo kapa ke supise lipotso tseo u ka li botsa ngaka ea hau.
assistant.errorNetwork: Phoso ea marang-rang. Ka kopo hlahloba khokahano ea hau.
assistant.errorUnknown: Ha e kaka ea fumana karabo. Ka kopo leka hape.
